reviews.title: Normal room
reviews.text: The room lacks quite a few necessary items such as shower gel, a toothbrush, blankets, etc. Only when asked does the staff provide them. Since the inn is also new, I find that the service is not good because it is amateurish.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Bon pour passer une nuit avant de prendre le bateau pour Pho Quoc

reviews.title: Decent budget accommodation
reviews.text: Stayed for two nights to visit family in the area. Location was perfect, as it is a 5 minute walk to pier in morning to catch ferry. It is also adjacent to a supermarket and a coffee shop, which is nice. The AC worked nicely. Unfortunately, the shower drained very slowly, so  one was left standing jn a significant pool of water. There were some micro-ants in the room that made sleeping a bit difficult, since those little shits hurt when they bite.  Perhaps my room was a fluke though. Had it not been for the ants and drain, i certainly would return again for a lengthier stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Gutes preis-leistungsverhältnis. Alles unkompliziert. Perfekt für den zwischenstop, um mit der Fähre weiterzufahren.

reviews.title: Clean accommodation
reviews.text: The facility is clean, and all amenities are well-maintained. The location is great, with a shopping mall right in front, and there are many cute cafes nearby, making it convenient. The water pressure in the bathroom is good, and the bedding is relatively clean, with a good mattress that allowed me to get a good night's sleep for the first time in a while. Typically, hotels under 20,000 won per night have sponge mattresses, but this place uses a Bonnell spring mattress, which is nice. The downside is that it can be a bit noisy in the morning and evening, and there is no elevator (3rd floor). I would not recommend it for smokers, as it seems all rooms are non-smoking. Overall, I am very satisfied with the cleanliness and comfort for the price. All facilities are new.

reviews.title: Hotel charges more illegally if you want VAT invoice
reviews.positives: Had a decent experience here until the property attempts to charge me more (illegally) for issuing VAT invoice.
reviews.negatives:
This hotel charges 10% VAT (you have to pay 2% extra) for issuing VAT invoice even though the price displayed on Booking already includes 8% VAT which is the right VAT rate by law. Something you should be aware of if you need invoices.
Khách sạn báo nếu xuất hóa đơn VAT thì tính 10% VAT mặc dù nhà nước quy định 8% VAT cho đến năm sau cho các cơ sở kinh doanh lưu trú và giá trên Booking đã bao gồm 8% VAT. Không biết là nhà nghỉ 68 đăng ký loại hình kinh doanh gì 🙂

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: new, clean motel, close to the pier, within walking distance

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Phòng trang bị tiện nghi tương đối đầy đủ
reviews.negatives: Không có nước uống phục vụ, giá hơi cao so với mấy nơi nghỉ khác

reviews.title: Clean and beautiful.
reviews.text: Beautiful, clean room.

reviews.title: This place mau just suit you
reviews.text: If you find yourself overnight in Rach Gia then this place is ideal. My ferry times did no match up so I stayed overnight in Rach Gia. This hotel is well priced, clean and only 300m from the ferry terminal. Its also across the road from a big supermarket. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Удобная постель. Хорошее расположение, чтобы утром дойти пешком до парома на Фукуок

reviews.title: Great location.
reviews.text: Great location close to ferry office, ferry terminal, giant supermarket and some really good eating places plus many, many coffee shops. Really nice people here. Recommended.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Close to the port and has a huge room. Clean and tidy.
reviews.negatives: No lift/elevator. Staff at night seemed snooby.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner and staff  of the Hotel is so very kind .They will help the best way they can and hotel.is near supermarket .Greatvlocation as well

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean, within walking distance to the train station, reasonably priced.

reviews.title: There is no hairdryer in the room.
reviews.text: If there is an additional hair dryer in the room, the service would be even better.

reviews.title: Comfortable and Quiet
reviews.text:
I have stayed here a few times and it’s perfect as a layover to the outer islands or Phu Quoc.
It’s 5 min walk to the ferry and there is a well stocked supermarket across the road.

reviews.title: Guesthouse
reviews.text: Convenient amenities, advantageous location.

reviews.title: Très bien pour le prix
reviews.text: Bien situé. Aucun problème.

reviews.title: Très accommodant
reviews.text:
L'hôtel nous a très bien acceuilli, le personnel est super gentil et se soucis de notre confort.
Les chambres sont très propres, eau chaude, balcon et télévision fonctionnelle.

reviews.title: Simple but great
reviews.text:
We had a very simple room (no window), but that's what we needed and for that price it was perfect. There were still a TV and AC, and some towels were provided.
The room and bathroom were very clean.
Location in the city is good, close to the ferry departure and to many restaurants and cafes.
Special note to the person from the staff (maybe she was the owner ?), who spent some of her time to help us change our wrong ferry ticket and afterwards drove us to a special shop where we had to buy something. That was extremely helpful and appreciated.
I would 100% recommend this place.

reviews.title: Optimal für einen Tag nach der Überfajrt PQ
reviews.text: Sehr zentral, sehr nett, alles zu Fuß machbar

reviews.title: Sehr sauber
reviews.text: Alles war super unkompliziert. Das Zimmer war wie beschrieben. Super Sauber und sehr bequemes Bett.

reviews.title: Good accommodation with friendly and helpful staff
reviews.text: Great rooms, close to port to catch your ferry. Friendly and helpful stuff that went the extra mile! 10/10

reviews.title: 여기는후져오지마셍
reviews.text: 물도업고창뭌도없고모기가마나서밤새개고생해쪄요
reviews.response:
Hi dear,
Firstly we would like to apologize for the inconvenience and disappointment that you experienced in our hotel. Actually we didn't know that has happened to you on that time but we assure you that your complaint will give us the opportunity to remedy any problem that may exist and help to improve our service futher.
Once again, please accept our apologies.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very big room with balcony and light. Clean, quiet. Good and nice service.  Close to harbour.  Hot water.  Good choice for basic needs.

reviews.title: 1 night stay
